name: chacon-travel
description: Browser-automated travel search for flights, hotels, and vacation packages. Runs headless Playwright searches with Chrome MCP fallback across Google Flights, Southwest, Expedia, Kayak, Costco Travel, VRBO, Airbnb, and Southwest Vacations.
author: Joe Chacon

skills.name: flights
skills.description: Search Google Flights, Southwest, Expedia, and Kayak for round-trip flight prices

skills.name: hotels
skills.description: Search Google Hotels, Expedia, Kayak, Costco Travel, VRBO, and Airbnb for hotel and vacation rental prices

skills.name: vacation-packages
skills.description: Search Southwest Vacations, Costco Travel, Expedia, and Kayak for bundled flight + hotel packages

skills.name: search-all
skills.description: Run all travel searches in parallel as sub-agents and aggregate into a unified trip cost summary
